{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/nautilus/npp-humanitarian-extension/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. npp-humanitarian-extension

_Файлов:_ 6

h2. Содержание

* [00-question-can-it-apply-to-docs.md|00-question-can-it-apply-to-docs.md] — 
* [01-structural-comparison-code-vs-docs.md|01-structural-comparison-code-vs-docs.md] — 
* [02-mcp-claude-desktop-use-cases.md|02-mcp-claude-desktop-use-cases.md] — 
* [03-what-doesnt-exist-on-market.md|03-what-doesnt-exist-on-market.md] — 
* [04-grant-opportunities.md|04-grant-opportunities.md] — > [!TIP]
* [05-which-combination-more-valuable.md|05-which-combination-more-valuable.md] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [README|docs/nautilus/community-discussions/habr-article-1-reaction/README.md] (сходство 0.17)
* [README|docs/nautilus/community-discussions/practical-observations/README.md] (сходство 0.15)
* [README|docs/lorenzo-agent/scenarios/README.md] (сходство 0.15)
